title: Mini Cordless Rotary Tool Kit: 18000 RPM High Speed Power USB Rechargeable Multi Tool, Portable Mini Grinder with LED Light for DIY Engraving Grinding Polishing Cutting Sanding
features: Powerful 5-Speed Adjustment: This cordless rotary tool equipped with 5 adjustable speed levels (5000/8000/11000/14000/18000 RPM), the tool adapts to all work scenarios. Use 5000-8000rpm for polishing/cleaning, 11000-14000rpm for engraving/carving, and 18000rpm for efficient cutting—one tool handles it all

64Pcs Complete Accessories Kit: The cordless rotary tool set includes several kinds of rotary tools, such as sanding bands ,diamond bits, polishing wheels, grinding stones, collets (different diameter 0.5mm, 1.0mm, 1.5mm, 2.4mm, 3.0mm, 3.2mm) and so on, which allows the machine to directly drill, polish, engrave, clean, grinding, cutting, manicure etc

LED Light for Precision Work: Equipped with a built-in LED light, the electric grinder brightens every work spot. Press the power button twice consecutively; the light will turn ON/OFF. Whether you’re engraving small crafts, polishing jewelry, or cutting delicate materials in dim corners, the light keeps details visible for comfortable, error-free operation

Cordless Freedom with USB Charging - Equipped with a 2000mAh battery and ECP protector to prevent overcharging (auto-stops when full). Charge via USB anytime, anywhere—indicator shows green when ready. First use? Charge 12 hours to maximize battery life

Warm Note: The mini rotary tool is a multi-tool, it is more suitable for DIY work arts crafts and other small projects, please not use the mini Grinder tool to large or heavy projects. Any issue pls contact us now!
